CMCSA.name: Comcast
CMCSA.live_note: investors.comcast.com is NXDOMAIN. Q4Inc (events.q4inc.com) is a JS-only SPA with auth-gated API. Live stream URL not discoverable without a running browser. Replay path is the pilot. replay_url set to YouTube Q1 2026 recording for rehearsal.
CMCSA.webcast_url_note: Event-specific URL disclosed in Business Wire press release ~4 weeks before call. Must be captured manually and added to replay_url when available.
CMCSA.replay_url_note: YouTube recording of Q1 2026 earnings call, 50:28. For rehearsal use.
CMCSA.max_capture_note: Limit to 5 minutes for rehearsal. Remove for live/full replay capture.
